title: Subscription Plan to submit application in marketplace
excerpt:
Good morning, Sir, Madam, 
I would like to publish an application that I built in the marketplace. 
Can I submit my application to the marketplace with basic subscription plan? 
Regards,

posts.author: rmanga86 (Manga)
posts.cookedHtml:
Good morning, Sir, Madam,

I would like to publish an application that I built in the marketplace.

Can I submit my application to the marketplace with basic subscription plan?

Regards,

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @rmanga86,

If the question is if you need a different monday plan (than basic) for you to submit an app for review for the marketplace, then no.

You do not need a different monday plan.

You can submit it from the basic plan😄
